name: Submit PartnerBasicMass offer successfully

steps.name: Given the Submit PartnerBasicMass Offer API is available
When I submit a Conditional offer using "PartnerBasicMassOffer.json"
Then the response status code should be 201
And the response should contain offerId
And the response should contain offerCode
And the response status should be "LoadedToCampaign"

fullName: Submit PartnerBasicMass Offer API: Submit PartnerBasicMass offer successfully
